use_cases: Display team members with avatars and contact information in admin dashboards
Manage user access and permissions in SaaS applications
Show organization members in collaboration tools
ai_summary: A team member card list component featuring a header with descriptive text, an 'Add new member' action button, and a grid of member entries displaying avatars, names, and emails. Built with Tailwind CSS using standard indigo color scheme and responsive flexbox layout. Part of the Float UI component collection for dashboard interfaces.
